problem id: 3970c492
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  10010011 -> 10111010
  00101101 -> 00000101
  00011110 -> 00000011
  01011010 -> 00001011
  00111101 -> 00100101
  00111010 -> 11001011
  11011010 -> 00001011
  01100111 -> 11010001

query: 11111011
predicted answer: 01101011
